stemHtml:
Which of the following statements is an interpretation of the SIGMET ?

LSAS SIGMET 2 VALID 030700/031100 LSZH- SWITZERLAND FIR/UIR MOD TO SEV CAT FCST N OF ALPS BTN FL 260/380 STNR INTSF

options.a: Moderate to severe clear air turbulence of constant intensity to be expected north of the Alps
options.b: Severe turbulence observed below FL 260 north of the Alps. Pilots advised to cross this area above FL 380
options.c: Zone of moderate to severe turbulence moving towards the area north of the Alps. Intensity increasing. Pilots advised to cross this area above FL 260
options.d: Moderate to severe clear air turbulence to be expected north of the Alps. Intensity increasing. Danger zone between FL 260 and FL 380
